# Orbis API Marketplace — llms.txt

## What is Orbis?
Orbis is an API marketplace for the agent era. It hosts 2,300+ production-ready utility APIs that AI agents and human developers can discover, call, and pay for per-call using x402 (USDC on Base). No subscriptions required for agents.

## How agents use Orbis
Agents pay per API call using the x402 protocol — a standard for HTTP micropayments using USDC on Base (Coinbase's L2). Payment is sent in the HTTP header; no API keys or accounts required.

## Key endpoints

### Discover APIs
GET https://orbisapi.com/api/marketplace/apis?search={query}&limit=10
Returns: list of APIs with slug, name, description, price, endpoint

### x402 Discovery (full catalog, crawlable)
GET https://orbisapi.com/api/v2/x402/discovery/resources?offset=0&limit=20
Returns: x402-formatted resource list with pricing, payment address, endpoint details

### Call an API (x402)
POST/GET https://orbisapi.com/proxy/{api-slug}/{endpoint}
Header: X-PAYMENT: <x402 payment token>
Price: typically $0.001 per call

### MCP Server
Connect via MCP for tool-based access:
npx -y mcp-remote https://orbisapi.com/mcp?key=YOUR_KEY

## Install agent skills
npx skills add OrbisAPI/agent-skills

## Categories
Finance, Weather, AI/ML, Data, Text utilities, Image generation, Crypto, Sports, Travel, and 50+ more

## Links
- Marketplace: https://orbisapi.com/marketplace
- For agents: https://orbisapi.com/for-agents
- MCP: https://orbisapi.com/mcp
- x402 Discovery: https://orbisapi.com/api/v2/x402/discovery/resources
